text: Created ticket Migrate critique, Ralph, and docs stores to shared storage

User clarified that repo-materialized `dashboard.json` artifacts are not useful and should not be kept in the repo. Going forward, dashboard views should be computed from canonical DB state or returned on demand, not materialized as committed repo projections. This affects the remaining critique/docs/ralph migration slice directly and also requires cleanup of already-migrated plan projections.

Applied the updated dashboard policy during t-0052: `dashboard.json` is no longer repo-materialized for docs/critique/ralph package stores. In addition, `pi-docs` now exposes async canonical shared-storage APIs for command/tool/index surfaces while preserving only `packet.md` and `doc.md` as repo-materialized projections. Updated dependent plan/Ralph consumers where needed. Verification for this slice: npm test -- --run packages/pi-docs/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-docs/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-docs/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-docs/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-docs/__tests__/runtime.test.ts packages/pi-plans/__tests__/store.test.ts passed (6 files / 18 tests), and npm run typecheck passed.

Verification complete: npm test -- --run packages/pi-docs/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-docs/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-docs/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-docs/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-docs/__tests__/runtime.test.ts packages/pi-critique/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-critique/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-critique/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-critique/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-critique/__tests__/runtime.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/runtime.test.ts packages/pi-plans/__tests__/store.test.ts (16 files / 50 tests passed) and npm run typecheck passed.
